name: 'typescript-testing'
description: 'Provides workflows and best practices for testing TypeScript and React code using Jest and React Testing Library.'
---

# TypeScript Testing

## Purpose

Enable robust unit and integration testing for TypeScript and React codebases.

## Instructions

- Use Jest for unit tests
- Use React Testing Library for React components
- Mock external dependencies
- Ensure high coverage for critical modules

## Assets

Refer to test-gen.prompt.md for test generation prompts.
